programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Heart
programme.desc: It has been six months, Jun exiled herself away from the city and had been living quietly with an elderly couple and their granddaughter.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: God
programme.desc: On the surface, peace seems to have been restored in Tokyo. Beasts still remain captured and are exterminated on a daily basis.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Man
programme.desc: Defeat of Jun at the hands of Lan is witnessed throughout the world. Government leaders hail Lan's victory and proclaims her as child of God who will bring a thousand years of peace.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Beast
programme.desc: Jun Fudo is taken by a mysterious woman and finds herself being attacked by a werewolf-like creature. As she tries to save herself, she transforms into Devil Lady.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Blood
programme.desc: Jun tries to regain some sense of normalcy as she resumes her modeling career but finds herself yet again struggling to come to terms with her true identity.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Wings
programme.desc: A mysterious boy appears in front of Jun one night, proclaiming that he'll kill Jun's lover then disappears in to the darkness. Fearing that Kazumi is in danger, Jun hurries to Kazumi's home.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Embryo
programme.desc: As Jun breaksdown and confess her struggles of being the Devil Lady, Lan Asuka appears once again to take Jun to a military compound.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Shark
programme.desc: Lan informs Jun that Aoi Kurosaki, Jun's old classmate, is possessor of Devil Beast Syndrome and may potentially be Jun's new ally.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Cat
programme.desc: Due to their similiar looks, Hitomi often loses out on her modeling opportunities to Jun. Despite this, Hitomi finds herself attracted to Jun, arising the suspicion that Hitomi may also be another Beast.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Fog
programme.desc: Experiencing her defeat at the hands of Airial, Jun ends up at a local hospital while a deep fog encircles the city. Dismayed by Jun's defeat, Lan commands her to battle the beast once more.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Enemy
programme.desc: Jun is introduced to Dr. Jason Bates who professes his interest in her, both as a woman and as Devil Lady.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Eyes
programme.desc: Jun can't shake off the feeling that she's being watched. All the while, Lan and HA team discover that curious string of murders have been occuring where the victims' eyes have been taken.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Flames
programme.desc: Four year old Remi is miraculously rescued from a fire. Suspecting her to be another Beast, Lan orders for the girl to be further evaluated.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Box
programme.desc: When four bodies are found inside an elevator of a department store in midst of a Christmas season, Jun is ordered by Lan to investigate the matter on a Christmas eve.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Faces
programme.desc: Jun wakes from a nightmare in which a Beast hunts one another. Puzzled by the cryptic dream Jun is haunted by the nightmare even while she's awake.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Rope
programme.desc: A highschool girl is lured to a famous illustrator, Otoya's residence. She is hosted by his sister-in-law who captures the teen and offers her to Otoya who had turned in to a Beast.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Home
programme.desc: Suspecting that Jun is connected to the murder of his wife and their only daughter, Sakazawa contacts her by claiming that he has kidnapped Kazumi.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Crows
programme.desc: As Kazumi debates on whether to pursue her career in modeling or to attend college, a series of murders occur in which victims are impaled in high places.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Voice
programme.desc: Mysterious series of murders show no signs of stopping. The guilt of putting Kazumi's life in danger further weighs down Jun, leading the two to revisit Kazumi's former home where her parents were murdered.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Hunger
programme.desc: Fearing that she is slowly losing control of herself, Jun soon decides that she can no longer continue her career as a fashion model.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Body
programme.desc: Jun is now kept in a HA facility. As they conduct various examinations she wonders off to a sector of the lab where she finds Dr. Bates who has been captured by Lan.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Shakles
programme.desc: The release of Sakazawa's notes about the Beast Phenomenon stokes further panic to the city.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Corpses
programme.desc: Beasts that had been defeated by Jun reappear in front of her to attack her once again.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Signs
programme.desc: A national vaccination has been obligated to the citizens in an attempt to prevent Beast Phenomenon from further spreading.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Wish
programme.desc: Shocked by Kazumi's transformation and nearly defeated by the Crusaders, Jun's consciousness begins to fade as she is rescued by Kazumi who has completed her evolution.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Life
programme.desc: Unable to recover from the sorrows of losing Kazumi, Jun quietly stares at the ocean. In her absence, the Beasts led by Crusaders attack the HA base to recover their captured allies.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Heart
programme.desc: It has been six months, Jun exiled herself away from the city and had been living quietly with an elderly couple and their granddaughter.

Brenda's genealogy assignment triggers a war between her mother Mary and neighbor Sandra over famous ancestors--but Mary's pride soon goes AWOL when she learns her family tree has root rot.

Mary's friends head for the highway after she implicates them in an angry letter to the President about a street pothole--but they make a quick U-turn when they discover the President himself is coming to fill in the hole.

Mary gets caught up in the fervor of a sidewalk sale to help new landlady Rose make some much-needed building repairs and sells off Lester's favorite lamp--unaware that he's stashed the sale's proceeds in it.
Mary begins to fret when Sandra--fired from her previous job because of a boss' jealous wife--lands a position at Lester's construction firm.
Trying to tackle the loneliness of football widowhood, Mary snags tickets to the big game--but she fumbles her chance to score points with Lester when she insists on going along.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un sujeto ataca a la UAC, el equipo entra en acción para averiguar quién es el responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la ex miembro del equipo de la UAC y actual agente de la Interpol, Emily Prentiss localiza a un asesino en serie internacional, pide la ayuda de sus amigos de la UAC.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un mes después de que el director Vance fuera secuestrado, a Gibbs se le asigna el papel de director interino en su ausencia mientras el equipo busca su paradero en todo el mundo, en el estreno de la temporada 16.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que un teniente de la Marina es encontrado asesinado en su jacuzzi, el equipo entrevista a varias familias en el peculiar vecindario de la víctima. Además, Torres debe enfrentar las consecuencias después de una noche volátil con Palmer.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Uno de los agentes del NCIS está sorprendido después de que el equipo investigue una explosión fuera de la casa del contramaestre de la Marina Todd Nicholas (Cameron Radice) y su esposa, la popular estrella de televisión Sheba Nicholas (Tara Holt).

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las tranquilas vacaciones de Gibbs en su remota cabaña son interrumpidas por una visita sorpresa de Tobias Fornell y el capitán de la Marina Phillip Brooks, así como una llamada del NCIS pidiendo su ayuda.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny piensa en retirarse hasta que Erin lo llama para ayudarla con un caso que involucra a su ex, Jack. Jamie y Eddie se infiltran como pareja, y Frank enfrenta a la nueva alcaldesa, Margaret Dutton.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Erin contra la famosa traficante de personas Chao Lin (Tia Carrera) se pone en peligro cuando el juez a cargo aparece muerto, y Danny y Baez deben investigar el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank recibe una orden de la alcaldesa para asistir a un desfile en honor a un hombre que estuvo en prisión por conspirar en un ataque contra la policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el caso de un detective que fue asesinado antes de testificar contra un criminal de carrera.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Wichita en busca de un sospechoso que secuestra niños mientras sus padres duermen. Además, Morgan está intentando averiguar quién fue el responsable del ataque.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: This season the cast packs their bags to raise some hell in one of the wildest party towns in the south, Athens, Georgia. Their first night, emotions run high, and the clothes come off, leaving the roommates with their wildest night yet.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The guys tease Daddy, Taylor reveals mind-altering information, and Lyle insults Tiffany, so she uses his face as a punching bag.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle shows off his pole-dancing skills, the gang starts their first day of work, Daddy gives Lil Bit a piece of his mind, and Lil Bit threatens to leave the house.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy and Lil Bit deal with the aftermath of their secret, Lyle and Lauren kiss and make up, Tiffany doesn't think Lil Bit's story adds up, and Walt gets lucky.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The gang thinks Lil Bit is running away from her problems, Daddy and Lil Bit try to move forward after their epic fight, and Daddy's friends come over for a wild visit.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Tiffany is fed up with her relationship and finds solace in the arms of someone else, and Mattie urges Daddy to rein in his anger.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lil Bit's boyfriend Grant comes for a visit (and Daddy thinks Grant is a snooze), Murray and Walt plan a scavenger hunt, Tiffany's relationship woes end, and Martha returns.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Mattie gives the housemates a major scare, Lyle and Daddy go hunting for marlins, Daddy brings home a girl to spark a reaction from Lil Bit, and Tiffany lives it up.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The gang brings some southern flair to Cabo, Lyle makes a fool of himself, a booty-shaking contest sours Mattie's mood, and Lil Bit questions Mattie's behavior.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Murray is over Mattie's antics, Daddy wins a drinking competition, Lil Bit celebrates her birthday and receives a spiritual gift, and Tiffany plans a birthday excursion.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The gang makes the most of their last day in Cabo, Lyle, and Murray create a custom gift for Daddy, and Tiffany thinks Lil Bit is sending Daddy mixed signals.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lil Bit and Daddy's relationship divides the house, Mattie helps Murray score, the gang plans a pool party for Mattie's birthday, and Lil Bit admits the truth.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The gang goes bar hopping on their last night at the house, Daddy is even more confused about Lil Bit, Mattie crosses the line, Lyle becomes defensive, and Lil Bit gets bold.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast looks back on their vacation to St. Petersburg, FL, dishing on Bradley and Raven's relationship, Hunter and Tommy's bromance and Ashton's aloof behavior in the house.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: As the roommates arrive in Biloxi, Mississippi for another wild vacation, they quickly realize they're a Lil' Bit short of eight people. But the party must go on, especially for Daddy, who pursues not one, but two of his roommates.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Hott Dogg is getting all the attention (and the other girls are jealous), and Daddy tries asking out every girl in the house.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The gang gets drunk and trashes a restaurant to celebrate Lyle's birthday, the Louisianimals start their new jobs, and Hott Dogg proves that she can party.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Hott Dogg tries to fix her problems with the girls by making dinner, and Daddy can't hear Lil Bit's name without getting emotional, which sets Tiffany off.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/03/2016. America’s most iconic river sustains more than 40 million people in the West. But as populations boom and the waters recede, will it continue to flow?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/10/2016. Can this magical kingdom of Bhutan, the happiest place on Earth, stay blissfully content as the modern world begins to encroach on its remote borders?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/17/2016. The stunning wildlife of Africa is under threat. Bill Weir goes on a safari to meet the naturalists battling to save creatures from extinction.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 12/18/2016. Bill Weir travels to Amsterdam, famed as one of the world's most liberal cities, to find out if it can stay that way amid a rising tide of intolerance.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/07/2017. What’s the best way to protect paradise? In stunning Patagonia, an American conservationist has purchased vast tracts of land to the fury of local developers.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/14/2017. As deforestation rages and unique species vanish, the fight is on to save one of the planet’s most special places before it is ruined forever.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/15/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the Crow Reservation, hunts with podcast host Joe Rogan and eats dinner at Butte institution Lydia’s Supper Club.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/20/2016. Bill Weir journeys to the heart of Cuba to meet America's distant neighbors, bracing for a tourist invasion.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/27/2016. More than two-thirds of babies in Iceland are born to unmarried parents. Will this nation be the first to let go of marriage completely?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/03/2016. America’s most iconic river sustains more than 40 million people in the West. But as populations boom and the waters recede, will it continue to flow?

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: While attempting to break up a fight between two women an officer is attacked by one of the brawler’s boyfriends. Officers confiscate a negligible amount of marijuana from a man during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress before paramedics arrive to treat him. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After crashing a car during a pursuit, the driver runs into a pho restaurant and is captured. A loitering suspect is spotted smoking a meth pipe. A drunk driver is pulled from a smoking wreck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie. A chatty driver racks up a slew of charges in front of his own house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man takes off running, a woman interferes with a traffic stop involving her boyfriend, and deputies respond to a dispute between a man and his girlfriend's son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is apprehended after trying to evade arrest, a convicted felon is detained when police make some illegal discoveries in his van, and deputies seize a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a routine traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers and residents systematically retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. A police department conducts a drug-reversal-buy sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument. A mom and dad deny that their habits could affect their child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sibling reluctantly called authorities when his belligerent brother refused to leave his mother's home. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle parked at a local gas station.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murders of an Elvis impersonator and a bird that are strangely connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a rock and roll groupie and the disappearance of a prostitute who both have ties to a mysterious band.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to investigate when an entire family is reported to have been missing for a month.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell is taken hostage after a teenager opens fire in a police station.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs track a cannibalistic killer and discover he's not alone.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the cyber-related murder of a prominent casino owner's wife and receive help from the FBI's Cyber Crime Division.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a present-day crime with ties to a mob heist that occurred 25 years ago. Meanwhile, Brass has a decision to make when his daughter attempts suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Finlay must deal with a bomb planted in her car, while Russell gets a call from someone claiming to be the Gig Harbor killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a robbery and fatal shooting at a medical marijuana shop.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara and Greg are quarantined after responding to a crime scene contaminated with a deadly pathogen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team suspects foul play when a chemistry teacher's science experiment goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Morgan, Sidle, and Finlay try to relax at a forensics conference when a mass shooting occurs on site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Frustration mounts for the CSI team as another victim surfaces, and all evidence points to the Gig Harbor Killer. Guest stars include Mark-Paul Gosselaar, Mark Valley, and Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a woman full of alcohol and drugs in a pool at a rehab facility.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: U+000AUna noche llena de celebración termina con una explosión cuando el director de una fundación de becas para sordos es asesinado por un mortal coche bomba, lo que llevó a Sara a interrogar a los estudiantes y profesores de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una donación de segunda mano se vuelve espantosa cuando se encuentra un cadáver en una caja. Mientras tanto, la esposa de Langston hace una visita sorpresa al laboratorio criminalístico.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifica contra el famoso asesino de 'Dick y Jane', Nate Haskell. Mientras tanto, Nick recibe una llamada de un adolescente con problemas, Jason McCann, para advertirle del peligro inminente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo CSI está en alerta zombi cuando dos hombres inicialmente declarados muertos misteriosamente vuelven a la vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ex policía convicto, el equipo de CSI se topa con una lista en su celda de la prisión con los nombres de varias personas que creía que podrían haber sido el verdadero asesino de su esposa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una serie de muertes instigan una apuesta entre el equipo de CSI en cuanto a si han "golpeado para el ciclo," un homicidio, un suicidio, un accidente y una muerte natural en una sola noche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Sara se dirigen a Lady Heather en busca de ayuda para localizar al culpable responsable de herir a una mujer antes de que aparentemente fuera mutilada hasta la muerte por un león de montaña.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de su fuga, Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane", reaparece cuando envía por correo electrónico un inquietante video de amenaza de muerte al padre de una de sus novias.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston se vuelve más decidido que nunca a localizar a Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane," después de descubrir que ha secuestrado a su ex esposa, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de años de persecución y un sinnúmero de asesinatos, Langston se encuentra cara a cara con el asesino en serie, Nate Haskell, dentro de la casa donde comenzó su juerga de asesinatos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Múltiples tiroteos y apuñalamientos en un tranvía público dejan al equipo de CSI con un testigo y muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Tres sospechosos se presentan con tres razones diferentes por las que mataron a toda una familia y el equipo de CSI tiene que determinar quién dice la verdad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante una cita,Stokes se da cuenta de que una obra de arte en una exhibición tiene partes del cuerpo en descomposición,lo que lleva a una investigación en toda regla.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El exalcalde de Las Vegas recibe un disparo en el Museo de la Mafia y el equipo de CSI se embarca en una lección de historia en busca de pistas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer suspected of killing young women and branding them with a 'Y' is caught and also identified as having the extra Y chromosome.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a probation officer, and Horatio learns that one of the suspects in the murder may be a son he didn’t know he had.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the apparent murder of a college girl, while Delko has mysterious sightings of the late Tim Speedle.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After the Internet turns a high school girl into an international sex symbol, information leaked about Horatio puts his life in danger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team exhaustively search for Horatio’s son after he goes missing during a surprising and deadly prison break.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a sports legend is murdered, the investigation hits a snag when the lab loses the body. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Bizarre occurrences begin to plague the CSIs as they hunt down a serial killer who struck during a total eclipse of the sun.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a model is electrocuted on the runway, the case leads Horatio and the CSI team back to Horatio’s son and his nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a family vacation turns deadly, the CSIs must find the killer before the survivors take justice into their own hands.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An attempt on Calleigh's life puts both her professional and personal life in jeopardy. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Lifestyles of the rich and famous come under the microscope of Horatio and the CSI team when a wealthy family's nanny turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a rare and illegal machine gun vaporizes three weapons' smugglers, the CSIs must find the killer before the gun causes more deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's ex, and Kyle's mother, resurfaces in Miami as a billionaire's widow who will do anything at all to get her son back.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a woman, the CSIs uncover a meth lab in her apartment and an unscrupulous FBI agent with a secret life of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar cuando encuentran a una prostituta muerta a puñaladas metida bajo una cama después de que se limpió el cuerpo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando se revela que una red de laboratorios clandestinos está fabricando drogas mortales, Horatio y Speedle investigan la situación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y Speedle investigan cuando un ladrón y violador ha sido agredido sexualmente y atado con cintas a los pilares de su cama después de que lo mataron por asfixia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo se exponen a radiación mientras investigan un asesinato, lo que los lleva a un abogado ambientalista que se muere de envenenamiento por radiación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar el asesinato de un inmigrante de Europa del Este asesinado a puñaladas en una cabina de espectáculos eróticos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se apresuran para encontrar nuevas pruebas para un juicio en curso por asesinato para evitar la condena de un hombre posiblemente inocente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se suponía que era un viaje encubierto de rutina al incinerador para deshacerse de pruebas de drogas, pero emboscan a los oficiales de policía.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El caso de Horatio de una mujer asesinada se ve comprometido cuando se involucran los agentes federales, que tienen su propio plan a seguir.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un ex-convicto que Horatio envió a la cárcel le pide que lo ayude a encontrar a su hijo desaparecido. Él encuentra marihuana mientras busca en la habitación del chico.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Estudiantes de todo el país van a Miami para pasar una semana de diversión bajo el sol. La fiesta se interrumpe cuando llaman al equipo de CSI a dos casos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Speedle y Delko están disfrutando de un lugar nocturno de moda en Miami, Club Descent, cuando la pirotecnia del DJ desencadena un incendio que arrasa al club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en la cultura de las drogas después de que ocurre un brutal asesinato y una explosión casi fatal en la casa de un adicto a la metanfetamina.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando llaman a Horatio al Centro de Detención de West Miami para investigar a un preso asesinado, termina presenciando la fuga de tres presos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que una joven modelo es asesinada por un conductor que se da a la fuga, Horatio investiga al dueño del auto, que afirma que se lo prestó a los invitados a su fiesta.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators race to catch a shooter when Lindsay is injured during the attempted murder of a political candidate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates a 20-year-old case involving a missing boy when the prime suspect is found murdered on the anniversary of the boy’s disappearance.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a twisted fairy tale when a woman in a ball gown is found at the bottom of the pond outside Belvedere Castle in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a psychiatrist’s patients are being systematically murdered, the CSIs are forced to play along in a game of Clue in order to catch the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs must delve into the high-pressure world of elite prep schools when a student is murdered while studying for the SAT’S.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Det. Lovato’s cover is inadvertently blown, the CSI's investigate the Latin street gang she infiltrated when undercover.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates a 1920s-inspired speakeasy when one of its owners is murdered and $10,000 goes missing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is confronted with a puzzling mystery when two different victims are linked by the same unusual weapon.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beloved off-duty NYPD officer perishes in a robbery, the CSIs use the art of interrogation to break down their suspects and get to the truth.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a masked man is found at the bottom of a notorious skyscraper known for its history of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young pizza maker is carjacked, the CSI New York team of investigators must determine what the perpetrators were really after.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oficial involucrado (S8 Ep4)
programme.desc: Una salida nocturna amistosa para tomar un trago sufre un cambio inesperado cuando Danny y sus policías novatos se ven envueltos en un tiroteo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Las apariencias engañan (S8 Ep5)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga cuando el hermano de un joven prodigio del básquet, recientemente liberado bajo palabra, está involucrado en un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¡Déjenme salir! (S8 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando una broma de fraternidad en el Día de Brujas sale mal y un maestro de ceremonias es dado por muerto en una tumba abierta.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego siniestro (S8 Ep7)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando la noticia de una fiesta en una escuela secundaria se vuelve viral, lo que da lugar a una aglomeración, un porche colapsado y la muerte de una adolescente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Intercepción (S8 Ep8)
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga el asesinato de un juez, Jo se encuentra cara a cara con un criminal de su pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: 48 horas antes (S8 Ep9)
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo importante aparece muerto, Jo se ve envuelta en la peligrosa investigación del presunto violador que liberaron cuando ella trabajaba en Washington D.C.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sin rastro alguno (S8 Ep10)
programme.desc: Un cuerpo carbonizado se convierte en un desastre para el equipo de CSI cuando comienza a parecer que un luchador de artes marciales mixtas ha sido asesinado por su acosador.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¿Quién está ahí? (S8 E11)
programme.desc: Una investigación de violación de domicilio se vuelve más complicada cuando la familia de la víctima resulta ser menos perfecta de lo que parecía originalmente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Brooklyn hasta la muerte (S8 E12)
programme.desc: Un juego de rol se vuelve letal cuando un jugador es víctima de un asesino auténtico y el otro es secuestrado para pedir un rescate.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El efecto dominó (S8 Ep13)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga dos muertes aparentemente sin relación, sus rastros separados de evidencias conducen a una conclusión que sorprendentemente las vincula.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fin del juego (S8 Ep14)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se encuentra inmerso en el mundo de los videojuegos competitivos cuando descubre que un asesinato puede estar relacionado con un torneo de altas apuestas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Caso cerrado (S8 Ep15)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Salud (S8 Ep16)
programme.desc: Una ola de brutalidad amenaza a una pequeña comunidad de la ciudad de Nueva York cuando encuentran un cuerpo descuartizado y estratégicamente abandonado en cuatro esquinas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Obsequio de cumpleaños (S8 Ep17)
programme.desc: Llaman al equipo de CSI a un proyecto de viviendas en Brooklyn para investigar el asesinato de un exitoso empresario que se sintió atraído por su antiguo vecindario.

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show: 2 Women. 3 Babies. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Maury will reveal the results of paternity tests on today’s MAURY. Will Maury say “You ARE the father!” and are those the very words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: When Shalanda was 16 and pregnant, Cameron left her. Now, she and her mom want him to help raise their kid! James says he's had unprotected sex 500 times and is sterile since a childhood accident, but Kadee says he's the dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Is Tanille's baby also King's ninth child? Then, is Adonis the father of Cece's child? Plus, Melissa fell for her 41-year-old coworker Joey, but he vanished after she confessed to being pregnant. Who are the dads?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Krista isn't sure if the father of her baby is her husband, her ex-boyfriend or her ex's nephew! Then, Latasha is mad because her sister told her man that she slept with 4 other men, and he may not be the father of her baby!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Diamond says SP begged her to have his kid. Jenell says SP wanted to have a third kid with her! SP denies both kids! Does Tone owe Tonya's mom over $3,000 in child support? Is Jacob the father of Tyler and Matina's child?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Is Cortney the father of Brittany’s kids? According to his sister, Brittany cheated with her fiancé Clifton! Later, Melissa claims that her ex-husband didn’t father her twins and Sean’s the dad! Will the DNA results confirm this?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: After a night of passion with her neighbor, Lashanda claims that Avery is the father, but his girlfriend isn't having it! Plus, Nikki needs to prove that she has never cheated on Daniel or her relationship with her entire family will be on the line!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On Today’s MAURY these men say they know a paternity test will reveal what they’ve known all along – they didn't father the children of the women who brought them here. The women are ready to prove them wrong!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Top Ten Shocking Family Feuds
programme.desc: We’re counting down the top ten most unbelievable moments of family faceoffs! Plus we’ll let you know what happened to some of these guests after they left our show and returned to their lives.

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'll Prove You Are Cheating on My Teen!
programme.desc: Instead of chocolates and dinners, these guests are being cheated on and dumped. Love may be blind, but lie detector tests and hidden cameras will reveal the truth!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Linda is cheating on her boyfriend EJ with his dad Earnest! Yolanda wants Eddie to help take care of their child, but can she handle the results of the DNA test? Later, 2 teens get the DNA test that might change their lives forever!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Is Devin cheating on Shantia with other women including her own sister? He swears he's not a cheater, but our lie detector test will get down to the truth! Plus more shocking cheating mysteries solved!

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Falso testimonio

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un embrague de testigos
programme.desc: Dos testigos presenciales pueden tener la llave de la muerte de un miembro de una pandilla de motociclistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, el pornógrafo de San Francisco Artie Mitchell fue asesinado en su casa. Su hermano y socio comercial, que fue encontrado cerca del lugar con un rifle, luego confiesa haber disparado a Artie, pero la pregunta es si el disparo fue premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre, lo que hablaba del horror del crimen: el asesinato de dos niños pequeños y el apuñalamiento de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una pastilla amarga para tragar
programme.desc: Se cuenta la historia de la bombero Michelle Baker. Después de conocer al Dr. Maynard Muntzing, quedó embarazada de él. Después de esta noticia, ella se enfermaba siempre que estaban juntos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante siete años, un trío de hombres robó un banco tras otro. Siempre se escapaban antes de que llegara la policía y no dejaban pruebas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama
programme.desc: Una joven fue encontrada muerta en un campo de golf en las Bahamas. El césped de ese campo era tan distintivo que tenía valor probatorio. La evidencia llevó a la policía a dos sospechosos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Only two weeks into training camp, it's time to start making cuts. While "veteran" cheerleaders model bikinis for their upcoming calendar shoot, anxious training camp "rookies" dance their hearts out to prove to Kelli and Judy that they deserve to stay.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After saying goodbye to one of their own, reality sets in for the remaining training camp candidates: nobody's position on the squad is secure. The girls are fitted for the revealing DCC uniforms, then sweat their way through a punishing physical workout

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates don't know what hit them when tough as nails and brutally honest guest choreographer Kitty Carter teaches a class. Then, the rookies get one step closer to transforming into Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies get to wear the iconic Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders uniform for the very first time during a professional modeling shoot. Then the girls have a life-changing experience skydiving with the legendary Army parachute team, the Golden Knights!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC training camp comes down to the last grueling rehearsals and whose long legs fit into the famous kick-line. The cheerleaders attend a bikini boot-camp for last-minute toning. Then, amid tears of disappointment and shock, Kelli makes the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Over 600 excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the finals audition, the competition really heats up. Now, surviving candidates must go head-to-head against experienced veteran cheerleaders for a coveted spot in the DCC Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp begins! The newly elected training camp candidates are excited, even star-struck, as they meet the veterans for the first time at Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The group competes in a grueling army fitness test to try and earn the privilege of being on the elite "Power Squad." At that evening's rehearsal, the first cuts will be made.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies are given "makeovers" to transform them into the image of a DCC.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The entire squad needs a wake-up call and guest choreographer Kitty Carter gives it to them.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final dance rehearsal of week 7 has a surprise guest judge who puts everyone on edge. Ultimately, in Kelli's office, the tears flow as some dreams surprisingly come to an end.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Join 65,000 screaming Cowboys fans as the cheerleaders hit the turf and wow the entire stadium and themselves during their first Dallas Cowboys football game of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is the inside story of selecting this year's Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders squad with all the emotion and drama as hundreds of women hope to fill the 45-member team.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: If the candidates thought auditions were tough, they have no idea how brutal training camp will be. Kelli has to call three girls into her office for warnings...who will survive the first week of training camp?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's only the third week of training camp and it's already time to make cuts. Who will survive? The week starts with uniform fittings where even the wannabes get to try on the famous blue and white star-studded outfit.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The girls are in the dark about what Kelli and salon director Rainer Schneck have planned for them when they get their dramatic Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders makeovers.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: When DCC Director, Kelli Finglass, gives a former contestant a once-in-a-lifetime second chance to join training camp three weeks late, there is a lot of catching up to do.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: She's back! The notoriously demanding Kitty Carter comes to Valley Ranch to teach the intimidated DCC a technique class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy are forced to make tough decisions that are fair, but unfortunate. It's now or never for the remaining training camp candidates as there are only two rehearsals left before final cuts.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.desc: As Degrassi students head back to class, Drew decides the time is right to break up with Katie. Clare returns from the break excited to reconnect with Eli, but does he feel the same way?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: When Katie's anger at Drew boils over, she searches for a way to make him suffer. Eli clashes with Becky while planning Degrassi's next play. Meanwhile, a new guy catches Tristan's eye.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew feels like his life is falling apart. Is he upset about losing Bianca, or is something bigger going on? While casting the play, Eli and Becky work to resolve their creative differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig will do anything to impress Tori… even steal. Fiona wants Imogen to define their relationship: Are they a couple or not? The hockey team teases Dave about his role in the play.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli makes a difficult choice about her future. With a little help from Katie, Jake tries to prove himself to his father. Cam snaps at Maya before a big game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jenna bonds with Becky -- and Becky's hot brother, Luke -- but will religious differences come between them? Clare obsesses over her journalism mentor, Asher. Drew is offered a job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Clare tries to impress Asher by pitching a story about Romeo and Jules. K.C. and Bianca play matchmaker for K.C.'s mom. Katie chaperones Maya's date with Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A secret is eating away at Clare, but will facing the truth make things worse for her? K.C.'s mom has some surprising news. Meanwhile, Maya tries to impress Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam needs a break from hockey, so he blows off practice to hang out with Maya. K.C.'s dad is release from jail, but is he ready to have him back in the picture? Fiona's loft is a disaster, and she blames her new roommate -- Drew.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam struggles to live up to everyone's expectations on the ice. K.C. wants his dad out of his life -- even if it means doing something drastic. Drew and Fiona try to work out their differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen designs an elaborate set for Romeo and Jules, and reaches out to her estranged mother for the money to build it. Meanwhile, Becky interferes with ticket sales.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen worries about her dad's strange behavior. Becky bonds with Adam without realizing that he's transgender. Katie and Jake realize they have feelings for each other -- but where does that leave Mike Dallas?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eli organizes a surprise birthday party to cheer Clare up, and starts to suspect that she's hiding something. Audra urges Drew to go back to Degrassi. Dave worries that he and Alli are growing apart.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When a group of parents try to stop the play, Eli takes action. As opening night approaches, Tristan realizes that if he doesn't find a boyfriend fast, his first kiss will be onstage -- with Dave. Meanwhile, Becky wants to "save" Adam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: As Becky begins to fall for Adam, she worries how her conservative parents will react.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Scientists investigate the meteorite impact responsible for the extinction of dinosaurs. According to a theory, the event was triggered by a comet hitting the present-day Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs

programme.title: Natural World

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.desc: Nigel Marven's mission to uncover incredible deadly snakes takes him from the rice paddies of India to the jungles of Malaysia, from the heat of the Australian outback to the lush green fields of the English countryside.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI DESTINATIONS
programme.desc: Zam Expeditions and Kangya Pan Camp

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: In this episode Tom meets Ito Kinichi who claims to be the fastest human on all fours. Thom uses motion capture to analyse his unique form or human movement.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: Penya and Paza encounter a python; the adorable cubs go on their first bush outing; Lewa and Laili keep the zebra on their toes. Meanwhile, the research team have more experiments for the Ngamo lions.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, the six female cubs meet their future handler Tim, who will care for them at their new home - Bush Gardens in Tampa Bay, Florida.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, big change is afoot. Cheetah Outreach has been given a big opportunity, but it will mean leaving their current home for a new location.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: In this episode, Chobe has to say goodbye to his brothers who are leaving Cheetah Outreach to become overseas ambassadors. Meanwhile, there is a huge cheetah litter of nine new cubs, a challenge for the carers.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: Episode 6

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time in the Cheetah diaries, Chobe, who seemed to be in the running to be the next top cat, contracts a mystery illness. Meanwhile, the cheetah cubs have to be kept in isolation, missing out on some crucial training.

programme.title: The Lembeh Strait Walking Fish
programme.desc: Whale sharks, manta rays, and other big fish were once common in the narrow Lembeh Strait in Indonesia, but overfishing has long since eradicated the larger species.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time, the younger cheetah cubs are finally playing outside and Emily already feels that some of them seem more suited than others to become cheetah ambassadors.

programme.title: Nature's Warriors
programme.desc: To journey to Gabon is to journey back to a time before humanity's impact was truly felt on the natural world. Known as the last Eden on earth, Gabon is a green jewel in the crown of the vast, diverse and stunningly beautiful Congo Rainforest.

programme.title: Nature's Warriors
programme.desc: Hoedspruit in the Greater Kruger Region is home to South Africa's largest Rhino population. It's also Ground Zero in the war on Rhino Poaching.

programme.title: Nature's Warriors
programme.desc: Off the East Coast of Africa lies the island of Madagascar, known for its exotic visions of vast rainforests and dancing lemurs but as Julia discovers the reality is very different.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: At the wedding of Eric's best friend, the groom is attack and the bride goes missing, pushing Brooke into the work mode.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie makes an accusation and vows to get revenge; Bella navigates Rod and Evan; Amara forms an unlikely partnership that compels Titus to make questionable moves.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie and Irene conspire against Rondell; Titus takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie finds a way to keep her enemies at bay; the highly anticipated anniversary celebration at Thelma's Place ends sooner than expected.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: The Barnes have a big surprise for the Carlisles, forcing Stephanie and Evan to fight fire with fire; Amara receives backlash at work for her prior indiscretions.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie plays the ultimate trump card with Amara; Bella takes another chance on love, only to wake up to a nightmare; Rondell and Evan are blind-sided.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Evan and Rondell demand justice from Greg; Titus and Amara work to reconcile; Stephanie pushes back against Greg's cousin Natasha.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie closes in on Evan, Hunter, and Titus; Evan and Rondell are greeted with a blast from their past; Evan and Bella endure the worst nightmare of their lives.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Perla feels the heat; Amara sets a trap; Darcia unveils some life-changing news; Hunter nears the brink of disaster; Stephanie reveals a painful secret.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Missy is recruited to tutor Jupiter when his draft status is threatened; Cam and Allison's relationship grows, along with Reggie's business ventures.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Reggie has doubts about representing Jupiter; Allison declines Cam's expensive gifts; a crisis rocks the family.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: The tragic loss of a loved one leaves family members with a sudden hole in their lives.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: The Calloways and the Vaughns comfort one another as they navigate their way through the most trying ritual of their lives.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Reggie and Missy argue about the importance of modern manners and the role of social etiquette after they meet a wealthy Atlanta couple.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: A scandal erupts after Cam's words during an interview are taken out of context, leading to the creation of the Calloway Philanthropic Trust.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Media consultant Missy copes with the fallout of a decision at a photo shoot for Cam; Chen and Cassie use technology to close the gap of a long-distance relationship.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 3 de febrero de 1990, una niña huyó de la casa de su madre y desapareció sin dejar rastro. Su madre esperaba que la policía de Pasadena, en Texas, pudiera encontrarla antes de que fuera muy tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Delaware desapareció en 1996, sus amigos y su familia descubrieron su vida secreta. La secretaria del gobernador había tenido un amorío ilícito con un hombre casado y acaudalado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los 90, la policía de Washington D. C. estaba perdiendo la batalla contra las bandas callejeras que habían fortalecido sus territorios con gran violencia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio del 1992, unos bandidos enmascarados llevaron a cabo un robo audaz durante el mediodía. Esto marcó el comienzo de una ola de crimen que sacudió Seattle.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando la policía en una pequeña comunidad del estado de Washington comenzó a investigar la desaparición de una mujer de 22 años, no tenían manera de saber que se transformaría en una persecución a nivel nacional de un sádico sexual.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un extraño secuestró a una niña de ocho años mientras jugaba en el vecindario de Tucson, Arizona. Solo dejó atrás una bicicleta y a una madre desesperada.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una fría tarde de 1989, la capitana de la Marina Shirley Russel desapareció de Quantico, Virginia. La capitana Russel era una oficial dedicada; sus amigos y colegas estaban seguros de que no se había ausentado sin permiso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1996, el millonario de Nueva Jersey Frank Black viajó a Florida para cerrar un trato de negocios importante antes de su retiro.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1997, agentes del FBI empezaron a investigar al magnate de las estaciones de servicio de Nueva York, Gurmeet Dhinsa, por modificar las estaciones de combustible.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los años ochenta, la decapitación de un joven afroamericano llevó al Departamento de Policía de Miami-Dade y al FBI a lo largo de un rastro de asesinatos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1994, cuando un vehículo blindado de Wells Fargo desapareció de un centro comercial de Glendale, Arizona, las autoridades locales y el FBI fueron de inmediato a recuperarlo, junto con la carga de casi un millón de dólares.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Comenzando en California en 1995, un asesino en serie atacó a varias mujeres vulnerables. Al principio, se mostraba encantador y generoso, y con rapidez se tornaba violento. Era despiadado en sus crímenes y rápido en sus escapes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1987, un productor de televisión exitoso fue baleado en su oficina de Nueva York. Parecía ser un crimen profesional. Sin pistas, la investigación llegó a un punto muerto.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El robo a un camión blindado en Nueva York en 1981 dejó a un guardia muerto y a otro herido de gravedad. La policía detuvo a unos sospechosos en las cercanías y se produjo otra balacera que costó las vidas de dos oficiales.

programme.desc: Ron's bad behavior puts Snooki, Angelina, and Jwoww in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an anonymous letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra seizes control of the G.I. Joe space shuttle, using the shuttle and a series of relay cubes to create a pyramid-like “zone” no vehicle or machine can function in.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.desc: Cobra commander activates the pyramid of darkness, stranding not only the JOES but also his comrades the crimson twins. Always prepared with a backup plan, Tomax and Xamot have other designs for the pyramid and Cobra.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Chaos ensues as the leaders of Cobra struggle for control of the pyramid of darkness. As Cobra forces battle each other, the Joe team is able to regain control of space station delta and launch a full-scale assault to try to destroy the Pyramid.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Zartan, disguised as a notable French scientist, infiltrates the worldwide defense center on a mission to destroy the facility for Cobra. He's planted a bomb, and now the clock is ticking… can the Joe team find and defuse the bomb before it's too late?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra uses Tomax and Xamot's company extensive enterprises to purchase the Red Rocket food chain and use its location as a network of secret missile launching bases. But the JOE team catches on to the conspiracy.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a secret military satellite is forced out of orbit by Cobra, the Joe team races to its location before Cobra can get their hands on it. But both the Joes and Cobra find that a third party has entered the battle for the device.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: In a diabolical plan to control the world's fuel supplies, Cobra begins detonating oil tankers and pipelines by remote. But when sparks uncovers the frequency Cobra is using to destroy the tankers, the Joe team may be able to turn the tables on them!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra mounts an attack on the oil fields of a Middle Eastern kingdom. When the Joe team responds, their skystrikers are torn apart in midair by Cobra's sonic scrambler, a soundwave device powerful enough to shatter weapons and vehicles into pieces.

programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Clues and Suspects
programme.desc: Roby and Bleckt visit an injured Lloyd to complete the transfer of Zeatrix's powers as Arin links Bleckt to a clue in his investigation and follows him back to a secret office, where Wyldfyre has an idea to uncover his plans.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Final Game
programme.desc: Arin learns a devastating secret about the Merge and confronts Lloyd as Cole stays behind to protect the dragon horns. Sora faces off against Nokt, and Wyldfyre is too late to stop the manipulation of the games.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Elements of Betrayal
programme.desc: Arin, Zane, and Cole make a shocking discovery in the Monastery of Gates as they defend the Dragon Horns; the depowered Elemental Masters clash with the Wolf Mask army.
